description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a glossy white and light blue color scheme. The main hull is smooth and rounded, with a prominent blue canopy or cover on top, likely for water resistance and style. At the front, two black handlebars with visible grips and control elements are mounted, accompanied by a pair of green components that may be part of the control or ignition system. The rear section includes a contoured seating area with a ribbed texture for grip and comfort, and the base is supported by a sturdy, open-frame structure. The overall design is modern and streamlined, suggesting high performance and stability on water. The materials appear to be primarily molded plastic or fiberglass, with some metal and rubber components for controls and fittings.
description: A modern, streamlined jet ski with a glossy white and blue body, black handlebars, and a contoured seat. The design is sleek and aerodynamic, featuring visible control elements and a sturdy open-frame base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue canopy, black handlebars, and green control components, with the hull's rounded nose visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated, aerodynamic body, the open-frame base, and the blue canopy covering most of the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the contoured, ribbed seat area and the smooth, rounded back of the jet ski.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the handlebars, green control elements, and the open-frame structure beneath the hull.
attribute_handlebar_design: Dual black handlebars with textured grips and visible control elements, mounted at the front with a compact, upright structure.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single contoured seat with ribbed texture, designed for one rider, finished in light blue and integrated into the rear section of the hull.
